description.zh: 一个 ToolPkg 侧边栏记账本示例。宿主侧只保留薄薄的 compose_dsl 外壳，真正界面由本地 React 页面和浏览器式 WebView 承载，后端服务通过终端会话在本地启动。
description.en: A ToolPkg sidebar account-book example. The host keeps only a thin compose_dsl shell, while the real UI runs as a local React page inside a browser-style WebView, backed by a local terminal-launched server.
description.default: A ToolPkg sidebar account-book example with a local React page and WebView shell.

description.zh: 负责把前端与后端资源部署到 Linux 运行目录、安装依赖，并通过终端会话启动记账网页后端。
description.en: Deploys frontend and backend resources into the Linux runtime directory, installs dependencies, and launches the account-book web backend through terminal sessions.
